properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8 v6 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I give You glory For all You've brought me through And now I'm ready For whatever You wanna do

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm moving forward To follow after You And now I'm ready For whatever You wanna do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your presence is an open door We want You, Lord Like never before Your presence is an open door So come now, Lord Like never before

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In every season Your grace has been enough And I'm believing The best is yet to come

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The cross before me My hope on things above And in You, Jesus The best is yet to come

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: I know breakthrough is coming By faith I see a miracle My God made me a promise And it won't stop now :/ x4

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh oh Your presence is an open door We want You, Lord Like never before Your presence is an open door So come now, Lord Like never before

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus Come on, fill the room with praise Set off the atmosphere, shift it with your faith now Oh We welcome, Lord We welcomed him to praise Jesus? In the name of the Father We believe for grace Nothing is too hard for you Lord Oh, come on

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh oh Come on, if you believe in the breakthrough And you know all things are possible with God Lift your arms Yes, oh
